action.reasoning: Observation: Starting experiment with no prior runs or scores. Analysis: TripoSR is pre-cached, pre-installed, and designed exactly for single-image-to-3D reconstruction + novel view rendering; provides strong zero-shot baseline without needing training or fine-tuning initially (respects model size limit). Default render(n_views=11) likely aligns reasonably with the 12-view dataset setup for initial LPIPS measurement. Decision: Write train.py (creates dummy checkpoint since using pretrained), predict.py (implements exact eval contract using provided TripoSR API, tests on subset of val for validation, outputs RGBA PNGs), run test command to validate loading/inference before submitting eval. This gets baseline score + measures iteration time immediately.
action.command:
python train.py && python -c '
import sys, json, os, time
sys.path.insert(0, "/opt/triposr")
from tsr.system import TSR
from PIL import Image
import torch
print("Data inspection:")
print("Train objects:", len(os.listdir("/data/train")))
with open("/data/train/000000/cameras.json") as f:
    cams = json.load(f)
print("Camera example for view 0:", cams[0])
print("View 1:", cams[1])
print("\nModel test:")
device = "cuda"
model = TSR.from_pretrained("/models/triposr", config_name="config.yaml", weight_name="model.ckpt")
model.renderer.set_chunk_size(131072)
model.to(device)
model.eval()
print("Model loaded.")
img_path = "/data/train/000000/input.png"
pil_image = Image.open(img_path).convert("RGB")
start = time.time()
with torch.no_grad():
    scene_codes = model([pil_image], device=device)
    frames = model.render(scene_codes, n_views=4, return_type="pil")
print("Inference + render time (1 img, 4 views):", round(time.time()-start, 2), "sec")
print("Success: rendered", len(frames), "PIL images.")
' && python predict.py --data_path /data/val --checkpoint checkpoints/best.pt --output /tmp/val_predictions.json && ls -R /tmp/val_predictions_renders | head -20

command_output.stdout:
Using pretrained TripoSR model - no training required for baseline.
Dummy checkpoint saved to checkpoints/best.pt
Data inspection:
Train objects: 800
